narrative:
Precinct Chesapeake B (precinct in Lawrence County) has 322 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.5 percentage points.
